data.author: Jack Smith
data.message:
refactor: Refactor build files and Docker configuration for improved optimization and consistency

- CMakeLists.txt:
  - Remove explicit clang-UTIL version requirements for flexibility.
  - Clean up commented lines.

- service_types.h:
  - Use struct instead of sizeof to improve compatibility.
  - Replace std::copy with memcpy to avoid compiler warning (see GCC bug #106199).

- Dockerfile:
  - Combine RUN commands to reduce the number of image layers.
  - Remove redundant lines.

- docker-compose.yml:
  - Add user and group arguments to improve configurability.

- Dependencies:
  - Reorder urdfdom and urdfdom_headers setup for better clarity regarding console_bridge dependencies.

- Documentation:
  - Update README for alignment with recent changes.

This final cleanup improves consistency, optimizes the build process, and reduces the overall image size.

data.author: fwalch
data.message:
Set up project skeleton.

Include CMake, clang-format, clang-tidy, Doxygen, gitignore configuration.

CMake functionality includes:

 * Shared library with basic installation, (Debian) packaging
 * Google Test-based unit tests, including running tests with
   Valgrind, sanitizers
 * Example code subproject (can be built standalone)
 * Documentation generation with Doxygen
 * Code coverage generation with lcov
 * Running clang-format, clang-tidy
